_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: So ore, ki o wole.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan ni a ko lati sii fun gbogbo ede. Ede kookan ni ebun itumoo kan.
speakFriend.marksAwarded: Marks ti a fun (awon tokeni ikopa)
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Atoko ede ati osu won Marks jẹ igba die. Marks jẹ awon tokeni ikopa, kii se ipin.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Tumo Liana Banyan si {{language}}. Gba {{marks}} Marks lehin gbigba.
speakFriend.scopeCueCards: Eto Kaadi Itosoona Akoko (Awon Ofin Oro-aje + Ijoba)
speakFriend.scopeNavigation: Awon aami itosoona ati awon ifiransẹ asise
speakFriend.baseLanguage: Ede ipile -- ko si ebun ti a nilo.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Ohun Oludasile: Idi Awon Oro Wonyi
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Gbogbo oro ninu eto yii ni idi fun oruko re. Orisun awon oruko 26 pataki julọ.
speakFriend.howBountiesWork: Bii Awon Ebun Itumo Se N Sisẹ
speakFriend.step1Body: Sii Ebun Itumo lati Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Tumo gbogbo awon okun ti a nilo. Firansẹ nipasẹ Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Lehin gbigba, o gba Marks ati ki a gbasilẹ re ni IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "So ore, ki o wole."

languageSwitcher.tip: Lo awon ọrọ igbaniwolo ede orisorisii ni Enu-ọna Durin lati sii awon iriri alailegbe!
